storyInfo: The old Banshee recalls her past with Nasti in her clouded mind, and stumbles toward the Rhine Vivarium. Ferne finds Oakley imprisoned in the VIP rooms after being tipped off by Mercia, and the two of them escape together.

attributes.content: Thank you for the hospitality.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The pleasure is all mine. It's such a joy to see a Banshee these days.
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Why is that?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Makes it easier for me to ask for an elegy when me or my family reach the end of the road.
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Not much has changed with Kazdel, but few Banshees come anymore.
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Our departed kin won't find the myriad souls without your guidance.
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: I'm sorry.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I'll... do my best.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Just kidding. You came to treat that 'Roosting Tree' of yours, right?
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Is this the branch?
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Incantation analysis failed to discover the reasons behind its decay.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: It is the pillar of the entire Banshee race. A friend recommended you as a Child of Soil and Stone familiar with plants. Please—
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Let me see what I can do. I'll get some dirt...
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: Can you get a pot from the backyard? If you see any fowlbeasts stealing vegetables, just chase them away.
attributes.name: Gargoyle

attributes.content: 'Disperse.'
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The fowlbeasts disperse, but the decrepit vegetable garden is not quiet yet. A vegetable sprout vibrates violently in front of Væla.
Then, a black, branch-like horn emerges from the dust-covered leaves.
'Fowlbeasts stealing vegetables', eh...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Get lost or I'll rip your head off!
You shouldn't yell like that. It's bad for your voice.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: No need to be afraid. I would not hurt a child.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The young Banshee peeks out from behind the leaves, hiding a half-eaten piece of vegetable leaf behind her back.
Don't you dare take my food.
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: If it's 'your' food...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: What's that in your hand?
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: Before Væla can react, the young Banshee has snatched the Roosting Tree branch from her hand, and begins trying to eat it.
Pfft. Just a stupid branch that's been lying in the mud. It stinks.
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: Are you hungry? Let me see... I made some pastries from the dew-caps that grow along the shore of Mist Lake. It's the right season for them.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Hmph! Safer to scrounge food off the dead. Get away from me!
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: (Menacing howl)
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: You're not scared? Even those big mercs are scared of that sound.
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: That is the sound of the Banshees. Of our clan.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I have not heard this note in the song of the Banshees for a long time. Years ago, the last one who sang it...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: You are that child...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: You know who taught me the sound?
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: But I've never met you before.
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: We don't come to Kazdel much these days. Our home is in a distant valley, a place where trees grow, with fruit hanging from their branches.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: It's hard to find food. You gotta be ready for a beating.
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: But let's say the place you're talking about really exists, where fruit just grows on the trees like that... what's the catch?
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: Clever girl.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Maybe you should come with me. You belong there. You'll like it.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Even if you don't believe it exists.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Why should I?
attributes.name: Young Banshee

attributes.content: Your name is Nasti, isn't it?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Is that... the presence of a Banshee I sense? And... what's that? Wither... decay?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: No... Nasti... are you...?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Are you trying to repeat the mistakes of the past?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Most of the Rhine staff have evacuated the Vivarium, sir. Only Nasti and a few researchers are staying behind to organize documents. They don't look happy.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Are you happy? The plan wasn't to ruin the whole Vivarium.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You said the tour guide knew too much about the Banshees. This was a chance to expose her and drag Nasti into it. Kill two fowlbeasts with one stone.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: It was a rough plan to begin with. Isn't the Vivarium accident a convenient excuse to stop Rhine's inspections?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Convenient? And where do you think we'll find that frickin' guide?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I know Nasti. She would never let something like this happen to the Vivarium just accidentally. Besides, there's no way she would risk Rhine's exhibit, with the exhibition right around the corner.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: The guide... she was gone before the alarm sounded!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: She must have done something.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: It's not enough to just evacuate the researchers. There's a good chance that Nasti's already onto my plan, and is just waiting for evidence... evidence that I can't afford to give her.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Tell your men to find Ferne by sundown.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Yes, sir!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Deep breaths, Ferne... maybe she just went off on her own...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: No, no, no, she doesn't even remember why she came to Propeller Paradise, where on Terra could she go?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: But if that's not what she did...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Then someone must have taken her.
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Miss.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Wh-What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What are you standing there for? Hurry up and move the saplings for the exhibition. Those are our last ones—
attributes.name: Researcher

attributes.content: All dead... in five minutes?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Mercia reaches out to touch the withered tree in the middle of the Vivarium. She sees a small hole at eye-level.
A natural cavity... no, a connector?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The withered plants. The tree hole. No equipment malfunction... tell me, what was that 'branch' attached to you, and where did it go?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: It was Ferne!
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You took that bone pen from the tree in the Vivarium, didn't you?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: It's plain, simple, unremarkable. You couldn't have known that it was the key that controls the entire Vivarium. It wasn't your intention to sabotage it.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: ...Is Mr. Tannen waiting outside with his men?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I came alone, Miss. I don't think the responsibility for what happened to the Vivarium should fall on your shoulders.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: There are some things I still have to look into, but I've suspected that Mr. Tannen has been plotting against Rhine ever since he agreed to help the mysterious Banshee guest for no apparent reason. Either that, or his own private interests are involved...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You suspect your own boss? But he said Columbia would do good by a good person.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: He also said that there's nobody easier to deal with than a good person.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Then my client...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: There's a row of 'VIP rooms' outside Mr. Tannen's office. You could try looking there.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I hope your client just went out for a walk, I truly do.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Gordon must be behind this!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Altering the list of inspections, then sabotaging the whole Vivarium and putting the Rhine exhibit on lockdown... what he gonna do next, chase us out of Propeller Paradise?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: There is no problem with our systems or hardware.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: He sent someone to steal your bone pen.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: It's not like him.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Why are you trying to use logic to explain the actions of a bandit?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: They don't operate under the same rules we do, except when they talk officialese. None of the corporations on Propeller Paradise do.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: We're closer to the Barrier than anyone else. We're different.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Countless tech firms fall by the wayside, but the Business Registrar rarely gets any complaints. Why?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Because there is a consensus—in the Sky Age, the higher you stand, the more respect you deserve.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Gordon's interference with our experiments violates Propeller Paradise's consensus. He should...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You don't want to be bound by the rules, but you still want to exploit them.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You're proving that Rhine is not yet ready to reach those heights.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Stop working and listen up, everybody. This is about today's incident, and how we proceed from here.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Cultivation and I have confirmed that the seventy-two trees waiting to be replanted, three hundred and fifty saplings and more than one thousand ungerminated seeds, are all dead.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The Propeller Paradise Police are now in charge of investigating the incident. We don't know how long that will take, but there is no realistic chance that the Vivarium can be restored before the exhibition.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Senior researchers will have to stay behind and work on the incident report with me. The rest of you can enjoy a little time off. Any questions?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Director Lunorey. You said the Vivarium was our most important project, the cumulation of data sent back by the Ring Lab.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Does this mean that we failed to protect the last legacy of Galleria Stellaria?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Dismissed.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: VIP rooms outside the office area... here we are.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Mercia had suspicions, but no proof that Mr. Tannen really... never mind, the most important thing is to find the client!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: ...Try to run again, and I start breaking bones!
There's someone inside?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: For anyone's sake, quit crying and keep quiet until the end of the exhibition!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Ugh, my head hurts. Let me get a smoke.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Please, sir, let me go... I won't say anything about Mr. Tannen...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Oakley? What are you doing here? Open your eyes!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The impostor...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I've got a name. It's Ferne.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Mr. Tannen said he was gonna treat you well and pay you compensation. What's going on...?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Treat me well? He freakin' locked me up!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: And none of this would've happened, if you didn't impersonate me!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Hey, you're the one who begged me to take your number and resume that night, tears and snot all over your face. What did you say back then? You were a 'lonely soul looking for love'—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Alright, alright, stop, stop, STOP!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Me and my rotten luck... it's a huge deal, letting unauthorized personnel sneak into a high-security experiment zone. That's why they wanted to shut me up.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: But how did YOU get out? I heard the guards say that Mr. Tannen was gonna deal with the troublemaking imposter.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: ...I see.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Are we dead? I just wanted to see what life would be like in the future, but now it looks like I ain't got no future no more...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: You wanna join my tour, Real Oakley?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I got in unnoticed, I can get you out safely.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You can?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Man alive, I went out for a smoke and a whole PERSON just grew out from the floor or what?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: You can get in, but you won't get out!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Not gonna let us go in peace, huh?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Y-You mean it when you say you can get me out? I'll join your tour or what ever it is, just get me outta here!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Good. You won't regret it. Let me tell you about how I braved the dangers of the Bleached Wasteland—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Just deal with this guy! Damn, my hands are still tied...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Don't worry, a good tour guide never makes her customers do her job.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Welcome to Ferne's Tours! Please be aware that you may encounter loud noises during this tour.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Cover your ears, or keep your distance from me. Now, let's get moving—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Argh...
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Run!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Frickin' hell! After them! Don't let them get away!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police
